name: @ondewo/vtsi-client-nodejs
description: ONDEWO Voip Telephone System Integration (VTSI) Client library for Nodejs
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.build:auth: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --declaration --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types
scripts.pretest: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
